category_sources: source_facts.description says anti-aliased text rendering in OpenGL; official GitHub README describes fast anti-aliased text rendering in OpenGL and RGBA buffers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libdrawtext; official GitHub README heading uses libdrawtext.
docs_sources: Official README says examples and the commented drawtext.h header are the usage references, and links the official website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/jtsiomb/libdrawtext, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable font2glyphmap; official README mentions OpenGL, RGBA pixel buffers, freetype2, glyphmaps, and font2glyphmap.
